svg.title: EvalAI parallel processing diagram
svg.desc: Detailed diagram showing how multiple student papers are processed concurrently using ThreadPoolExecutor with max_workers=3, a shared queue, and streaming results

g.text: N student PDFs + 1 answer key PDF

svg.text: key JSON broadcast to all workers
Papers 4, 5, 6 … queue and run as workers finish

g.text: step events · done_student events · consumed by main async loop
drains queue · yields NDJSON lines · tracks completed count
